title: selaginella utahensis
intro: Selaginella utahensis, also known as Utah spikemoss, is a type of lycophyte plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its spore-producing stems and leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Selaginella utahensis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
